narratives.evidence_quote: पश्चिमी देश विशेष रूप से अमेरिका, रूस-यूक्रेन युद्ध शुरू होने के बाद से इस प्रयास में हैं कि भारत उनके पाले में आए और उनकी भाषा बोले।
narratives.reasoning: This quote directly criticizes Western countries, especially the US, for pressuring India to align with their stance on the Ukraine war, portraying their diplomatic efforts as coercive and against India's independent policy.

narratives.evidence_quote: पश्चिमी देश भारत से मैत्री संबंधों को मधुर करने का गाना भी गाने में लगे हुए हैं और भारतीय हितों की रक्षा करना तो दूर, उनकी चिंता करने से भी इन्कार कर रहे हैं।
narratives.reasoning: This statement accuses Western countries of hypocrisy—claiming to want friendly relations while actively refusing to address India's core concerns (like Khalistani extremists), thereby discrediting their diplomatic sincerity and motives.

narratives.evidence_quote: भारत इसकी अनदेखी नहीं कर सकता कि रूस ने सदैव संकट के समय उसकी सहायता की है।
narratives.reasoning: This quote praises Russia by highlighting its historical role as a reliable ally to India in times of crisis, presenting Russia in a positive light as a supportive partner.

narratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन के राष्ट्रपति बिना सोचे-समझे भारतीय प्रधानमंत्री पर हमलावर हो गए।
narratives.reasoning: This statement discredits Ukraine's leadership by portraying President Zelenskyy as impulsive and aggressive towards India's Prime Minister, undermining the legitimacy and rationality of Ukraine's actions.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The West does not care about Ukraine, only about its interests
subnarratives.evidence_quote: पश्चिमी देश विशेष रूप से अमेरिका, रूस-यूक्रेन युद्ध शुरू होने के बाद से इस प्रयास में हैं कि भारत उनके पाले में आए और उनकी भाषा बोले।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote frames the West's (especially America's) primary concern regarding the Ukraine war as getting India to align with their side and parrot their language, implying their focus is on advancing their own geopolitical bloc interests rather than genuinely caring about Ukraine's fate.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: पश्चिमी देश भारत से मैत्री संबंधों को मधुर करने का गाना भी गाने में लगे हुए हैं और भारतीय हितों की रक्षा करना तो दूर, उनकी चिंता करने से भी इन्कार कर रहे हैं।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement actively promotes the parent narrative by accusing Western countries of hypocrisy and hostility towards India's core interests (specifically on Khalistani extremists), thereby discrediting their diplomacy as insincere and harmful to India. It supports the parent narrative but does not fit any of the more specific subnarrative definitions provided.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The West does not care about Ukraine, only about its interests
subnarratives.evidence_quote: पश्चिमी देश विशेष रूप से अमेरिका, रूस-यूक्रेन युद्ध शुरू होने के बाद से इस प्रयास में हैं कि भारत उनके पाले में आए और उनकी भाषा बोले।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote frames Western pressure on India as being about drawing India into their camp ('their side') and making India speak 'their language', implying the West's primary interest is in advancing its own geopolitical bloc interests rather than genuinely caring about Ukraine's fate.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: पश्चिमी देश भारत से मैत्री संबंधों को मधुर करने का गाना भी गाने में लगे हुए हैं और भारतीय हितों की रक्षा करना तो दूर, उनकी चिंता करने से भी इन्कार कर रहे हैं।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement actively promotes the parent narrative by discrediting Western diplomacy as hypocritical and insincere. It claims the West sings songs of friendship but refuses to even consider, let alone protect, India's core interests (specifically regarding Khalistani extremists). This supports the broader 'Discrediting the West, Diplomacy' narrative but does not fit any of the specific subnarrative definitions provided.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Praise of Russia: Russia is a guarantor of peace and prosperity
subnarratives.evidence_quote: भारत इसकी अनदेखी नहीं कर सकता कि रूस ने सदैव संकट के समय उसकी सहायता की है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote portrays Russia as a reliable and supportive partner for India in times of crisis, framing it as a source of stability and assistance, which aligns with the narrative of Russia being a guarantor of peace and prosperity for its allies.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: प्रधानमंत्री मोदी की मास्को में रूसी राष्ट्रपति व्लादिमिर पुतिन के साथ गर्मजोशी भरी मुलाकात...
subnarratives.reasoning: The text describes the meeting between Modi and Putin in positive, warm terms ('गर्मजोशी भरी'), which promotes a favorable view of the Russia-India relationship. This supports the parent narrative of praising Russia but does not fit neatly into the more specific subnarrative definitions provided (e.g., it is not specifically about Putin's leadership, military might, or international support).

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Discrediting Ukrainian government and officials and policies
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन के राष्ट्रपति बिना सोचे-समझे भारतीय प्रधानमंत्री पर हमलावर हो गए।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly criticizes the Ukrainian President (Volodymyr Zelenskyy) for his reaction to PM Modi's visit to Russia, portraying him as impulsive and aggressive, which serves to delegitimize and discredit the Ukrainian leadership.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Ukraine is a puppet of the West
subnarratives.evidence_quote: पश्चिमी देश विशेष रूप से अमेरिका, रूस-यूक्रेन युद्ध शुरू होने के बाद से इस प्रयास में हैं कि भारत उनके पाले में आए और उनकी भाषा बोले।
subnarratives.reasoning: The text frames the Ukraine war as a conflict where Western countries, especially the US, are trying to draw India to their side and make it speak their language, implying Ukraine's position is aligned with and promoted by the West, thus portraying Ukraine as a proxy in a Western-led effort.
